title: BC Intensity Slide
description: Efforts from 15s to 5 min — complete race conditioning test

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 70% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 70%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 70%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/7. 15s at 200%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/7. 180-200% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Standing. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 200% for 15s. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 15s.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/7. Power: 180-200%, Cadence: 90-95 rpm, Position: Standing. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 2:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/7. 55% FTP, Seated. 2:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 20% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/7. 0:30 at 160%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/7. 160% FTP, Standing. 30s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 2/7. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 5 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/7. 160% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 2:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 25% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 2:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/7. 1:00 at 140%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3/7. 140% FTP, Seated. 1:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/7. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/7. 140% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 3/7. 140% FTP, 85-90 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3/7. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 3:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/7. 18 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 4/7. 120% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 4/7. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 4/7. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 36% complete. Rep 4/7. Fatigue is real — hold form. 120%, 90-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 3:00. Then 27min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 40% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 27 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 46% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 46% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 46% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 46% done. 115% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 26 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 52% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 60% through. 105% at 90-100 rpm. Your legs are burning. Perfect. That's lactate threshold working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 60% through session. Block 6/7. You've done 6min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 blocks to go. 15 minutes. This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 30 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 60% complete. 105% for 5:00. Don't let power spike. Stay smooth.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 70% done. 0 intervals left. 10 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 11min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 35 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 7/7. 79% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 200% × 15s. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 15s at 200%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 200% for 15s. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 200% × 15s. Standing, 90-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 80% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 12min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 80% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 41 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 80% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
